history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a wall (#), so moving forward is impossible. The cells to my right appear open floor, while the left side is blocked by the wall column. Turning right is the safest move to face the open path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at the bottom-center facing upward. The cell directly in front is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. The cells to the left side are also blocked by lava nearby, while there is a wall immediately to the right. Since forward is unsafe and right is blocked, the best next step is to turn left to reorient away from the lava column and look for a safer path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is open floor, while the area to the right forms a corridor blocked by lava above. Moving forward is the safest immediate progress and keeps me in the clear vertical passage.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
